title: TP Summer Journey
subtitle: A claymation-inspired travel passport world with Egyptian destinations, stamps, and cinematic scenes.
description: A playful internal event visual system built around a magical passport journey across Alexandria, Port Said, Ismailia, South Sinai, Fayoum, Luxor, and Aswan. The project direction included start/end animation frames, stylized 3D scenes, stamp moments, regional food and music references, and a cohesive claymation look.
highlights: Built a complete journey-based creative concept
Created scene prompts for start and end animation frames
Developed destination-specific visual details and stamps

title: World Cup Fan Zone
subtitle: Dark cinematic event branding for football streaming, prediction games, and employee engagement.
description: A high-energy visual direction for a corporate World Cup fan-zone experience. The concept included banners, mascots, social teasers, matchday visuals, prediction mechanics, and large-format branded spaces with stadium lighting and football energy.
highlights: Created mascot and football campaign concepts
Prepared visual prompts for multiple ratios and formats

title: BetMGM Workspace Branding
subtitle: Interior branding direction with wall visuals, danglers, and premium office atmosphere.
description: A workspace visual branding concept focused on branded walls, round danglers, interior applications, and polished corporate presentation. The goal was to create a strong brand presence while maintaining a professional office environment.
highlights: Explored different wall and hanging signage systems
Adjusted logo placement and premium lighting direction

title: Riyadh Air Activation
subtitle: A corporate activation identity with screen visuals, photo frame concepts, and travel-led creative assets.
description: A visual package for a travel-themed activation, including screen layouts, photo frame designs, country-inspired visuals, and branded experience elements. The direction focused on clean premium layouts, aircraft references, and modern event communication.
highlights: Designed screen and print-ready activation assets
Built multiple visual routes for event communication

title: 3D Mascot Campaign
subtitle: A cinematic mascot world using falcon, bull, and tiger characters in sports poses.
description: A dramatic sports campaign concept featuring stylized animal mascots, trophy moments, stadium lighting, confetti, smoke, football poses, and dynamic action compositions. The direction focused on keeping character identity consistent across different poses and banner formats.
highlights: Directed multiple mascot poses and campaign frames
Created cinematic sports lighting and composition prompts

title: TP Island Telescope Countries
subtitle: A skyline and sticker system showing countries visible from a themed telescope installation.
description: A location-based environmental design idea for a telescope room, using country skylines, labels, and print-and-cut emblem stickers for each destination. The system was designed to work horizontally across glass and walls.
highlights: Created a destination-based wall/glass visual concept
Designed sticker/emblem directions for multiple countries
Adapted layouts for horizontal environmental application
